title: limodorum ensatum
intro: Limodorum ensatum, also known as the tuberose orchid or wild vanilla, is a type of flowering plant in the orchid family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Limodorum ensatum include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce stress and anxiety, and promote a good night's sleep. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
